task: Rebuild the decision logic for Powder Bed Fusion (PBF) process-window qualification using only the embedded packet. Identify threshold crossings, test sensitivity (including a 5% sensitivity shift), and produce an auditable, review-ready deliverable: pbf_process_window.xlsx (with formulas/executable logic) and qualification_note.md (with intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final decision table). Do not invent inputs or use external data; mark unresolved ambiguity as needs_review. If any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift, set expert-review flag.
